parsed.explanation: 1. Replaced Unicode escape sequences (e.g., \u221a\u00b4) with their corresponding characters (e.g., –, £). 2. Fixed the misspelled tag </PRICE> to </PRIZE>. 3. Standardized format tags (e.g., 4t\u221a\u2264. to 4to., 8v\u221a\u2264. to 8vo.). 4. Corrected 'Bücher' from 'B\u221a\u00bacher'. 5. Fixed 'Eydgno\u221a\u00fcschafft' to 'Eydgnosschafft'. 6. Added missing closing tags for <FORMAT> where necessary. 7. Standardized the dash separator (–) for consistency. 8. Fixed '8.' to '8vo.' for consistency in format. 9. Corrected '12. 2. Pfund.' to maintain original structure. 10. Ensured all tags are properly nested and closed.
